text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, hey, it's you! This is givingfated encounter! We gottacelebrate! Wanna go hard on sometunes together?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I happen to be walking past the<n>station when I
get waylaid by Daitaku<n>Helios and invited to
karaoke out of<n>nowhere.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, the vibes aren't gonna vibe<n>with us just
standing here.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
You look like you need a res, and<n>singing's a
surefire way to make that<n>happen!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
This karaoke sesh's gonna be FIRE!<n>Let's
goooo!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Before I can make heads or tails of<n>anything,
Daitaku Helios drags me into<n>a karaoke joint.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: All right, bestie, let's do a duet!
choice_data_list: Buckle up and sing with everything you've got.
Clap and cheer to set the mood.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Oh yeah! Let's start off with "Make<n>debut!" ♪

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Bet! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
I'll put the music on. You order the<n>party platter,
'kay?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, letting loose and livin' it up at<n>karaoke
once in a while's not so bad,<n>is it?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Heck, let's go all-out and stay till it's<n>nearly
curfew!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Wahey!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I find myself having a complete blast<n>partying
hard with Daitaku Helios.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Echo forth! Fanfare! ♪ Sprint on!<n>Towards the
goal, I race!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! ♪ You're slaying it with that<n>cheering!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Hey! I knew it was you, Helios! I<n>could recognize
your voice from a mile<n>away.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Ahahaha! Was I singing that loudly?<n>That's
hilarious! I'm weak! Anyway,<n>since you're here,
let's sing together!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Waheeey! Ooh, should I grab some<n>more people,
then?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One invitation leads to another, and<n>more and
more Umamusume pile into<n>the room with
Daitaku Helios at the<n>center of it all.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: Um... What exactly is going on here?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: Maybe it's some kind of event?

text_block_list.name: Diretora Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Delightful! Bravo!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Woo, keep it going! Wahey!
